runTitle: v8.11.165 Vercel Production AI Assistant Live Smoke
skippedSurfaces: OAuth provider end-to-end login was skipped; guest PIN login was used
Full five-question conversational regression pack was not run; this was a targeted live smoke for the AI Assistant page
Admin-only /api/ai/status success path was not tested because the available browser session is guest-scoped

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI Assistant intelligent monitoring batch analysis

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI Assistant Chat, Reporter, and Analyst surfaces all returned HTTP 200 and rendered user-visible monitoring/report output in one guest session.
Vercel health/version APIs and Cloud Run-backed AI health were healthy for v8.11.165; Vercel usage remained normal after the live smoke.
Guest session could use intended AI Assistant surfaces, while /api/ai/status remained protected with 403 Admin access required.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after production AI Assistant smoke; effective usage about 10.7667 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: AI Assistant live smoke JSON evidence
AI Assistant live smoke final monitoring screen

completedImprovements.title: Verify Vercel production AI Assistant Chat, Reporter, and Analyst live paths
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.11.165: /api/health 200 healthy, AI health 200 ok, guest login 200, Chat stream 200, incident report 200, intelligent monitoring 200. User-visible Chat summary, Redis memory warning report, and monitoring analysis rendered.
completedImprovements.note: /api/ai/status returned 403 for guest, which matches the admin-only boundary rather than an assistant runtime failure.

notes: Health API checked with curl after browser pre-navigation health fetch hit expected null-origin CORS behavior. Curl /api/health returned services database/cache/ai connected and version 8.11.165; /api/health?service=ai&soft=true returned backend cloud-run healthy true.
AI Chat response summarized 18 servers: 17 normal, 1 warning, 0 critical/offline; warning was cache-redis-dc1-01 memory around 88%.
Reporter generated a Redis memory warning report with active issue count 1.
Intelligent monitoring batch analysis returned overall caution, 18 servers, 1 issue server, 17 normal servers.
Guest /api/ai/status returned 403 Forbidden - Admin access required; treated as an access-control pass for this guest-scoped smoke.
